channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Community Improvement Group - Hartlebury Way and Pembridge Close, 1st June
item.description:
I have sent several emails to CBC and completed your (highways) online form but have not received a response. Please confirm who I should be contacting. Together with other residents, we are proposing to set up a community group to improve the appearance of our streets. Our first project will be to make a wildflower bed on the corner of Pembridge Close and Hartlebury Way, which is currently grass. Other projects we are thinking about include - planting spring bulbs on the grass verges - improving the overgrown area of land by the railings opposite 1 to 9 Hartlebury Way - litter picking - cleaning up the river behind the houses at 20 - 42 Hartlebury Way - improving the overgrown area of land alongside the alleyway adjacent to Glenfall School field
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Hartlebury Way, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very wide, deep and dangerous pothole on kidnappers lane, 1st June
item.description:
Kidnappers lane. What 3 words: ///honey.spared.posts

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kidnappers Lane, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 1st June
item.description:
Pothole - deeper than tennis ball. 1/2 metre wide.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large potholes end of hall road, 1st June

item.title: The surface of the alleyway leading off Pirton Lane towards Barnes Wallis Way is in a very bad state of repair, broken up and uneven to walk on. This alley is often very overgrown with vegetation as well, 1st June
item.description:
Public alleyway leading off Pirton Lane, Churchdown by the railway bridge and the alleyway comes out at the top of Melville Road and turns into Barnes Wallis Way
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 267,269, Pirton Lane, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Many hedges are overhanging/overgrown along this footpath, 1st June
item.description:
Need cutting ASAP- obstructing narrow public footpath/right of way
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Southcourt Close, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 1st June
item.description:
Caller reports that branches are loose and some have fallen, not blocking a path or carriageway, caller is concerned that the branches will fall as the tree/branches in question is very dry and seems unstable
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Depression FW 700x600x20mm approx Standard TM with temp FW closure Stats (FW6 Rutting&Depressions)

item.title: Fallen tree completely blocking bridlepath gate, 1st June
item.description:
The gate is on the bridlepath at the end of Lodilow Lane, immediately before the bridge over the stream. The bridlepath the gate opens on to goes around the Wingmoor Farm Recycling depot and ends up in Brockhampton. The gateway is completely blocked and impassable by humans or horses. Has been blocked for less than a fortnight.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lowdilow Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 1st June
item.description:
Overgrown vegetation obscuring FW Please cut back to boundaries. 25m approx 2 wqy stop and go with temp FW closure (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large potholes with white dots still not repaired - end of hall rd, 1st June

item.title: Fly tipping by waitrose ataurs, 1st June
item.description:
There has been fly tipping in the gap by the Waitrose stairs multiple times over the past week, including furniture, cardboard (some with personal details/addresses on) and bags of rubbish The W3W for the location is ///wonderfully.robots.softly

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Great Western Road, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree and bushes over grown uo cover street light and in garden, 1st June
item.description:
Corner of gramham place and nearest house 124 hesters way road been like it for months

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 124, Hesters Way Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Incorrect Road Sign, 1st June
item.description:
The new road sign says 'Dog Lane', this is incorrect. The road it is on that corresponds with our address and maps is infact 'Crickley Hill' or sometimes 'Crickley Hill Road', that leads to 'Dog Lane' past our property as it turns into a single track lane further up. This causes numerous problems to us and the business as deliveries etc cannot find the property, as they read 'Dog Lane' which is incorrect.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dog Lane, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
